---
name: Bug report
about: Create an issue to report a reproducible bug
title: 'Bug: '
labels: [bug]
---

<!-- Please provide as much information as possible. Do NOT include secrets or credentials. -->

## Summary

One-sentence summary of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Environment (OS, backend version, frontend commit hash):
   - OS: macOS / Ubuntu / etc.
   - Backend: (Go) version / commit
   - Frontend: (commit / `pnpm` version)
2. Exact steps to reproduce the bug (minimal reproduction preferred):
   - Step 1
   - Step 2
   - Step 3

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened, including error messages or stack traces.

## Logs & screenshots

Attach relevant log snippets and screenshots. Redact keys/tokens.

## Reproduction repository (if available)

Provide a link to a minimal reproduction repository or a gist with commands.

## Additional context

Any other details that might help (recent configuration changes, plugins enabled, MCP servers connected, memory backend).
